# This comment line is skipped by langcomp
 This space-prefixed line is also skipped
0001 ST_FIRST First real string
0002 ST_NEWLINE_EMBED Line ends with embedded newline@@
0003 ST_ESCAPE Escape sequence: ^[7mhello^[0m
0004 ST_BELL Bell character: ^G done
0005 ST_CR Carriage return: ^N here
0006 ST_BACKSPACE Backspace: ^H done
0007 ST_NUL Embedded nul: ^- end
0000 ST_ZERO Zero ID is always skipped by langcomp
0008 ST_PLAIN String without a macro name
